raw_text: The meeting was held on January 3, 1993.
valid until 16 may 1993
expected_behavior: extract '1993-05-16' (lowercase month, DMY order)

raw_text: Scientific American's September 1992 issue was a special issue.
expected_behavior: extract month=9 year=1992 day=None

raw_text: The year 2000 is coming soon and people are worried.
expected_behavior: no extraction — bare year without month context

raw_text: circa 1964 law enforcement work
expected_behavior: extract year=1964 (approximate year reference still valid)

raw_text: Published on 1993-04-15 in the journal.
expected_behavior: extract '1993-04-15' via ISO pattern

raw_text: Skarda, 1985; Skarda & Freeman 1987
expected_behavior: no extraction — years inside author-year citations are not standalone dates

raw_text: The law was enacted on 4/15/1993.
expected_behavior: extract '1993-04-15' via US slash format

raw_text: events in the 1960's prior to that
expected_behavior: no extraction — decade reference '1960's' is not a specific date

raw_text: He wrote in Oct. 5 that the results were final.
expected_behavior: extract month=10 day=5 year=None

raw_text: The oscillator runs at 32kHz with the crystal attached.
expected_behavior: extract 32 kHz frequency (no space between number and unit)

raw_text: Current drain at 3.7V Vcc is 150uA.
expected_behavior: extract 3.7 V (voltage) and 150 µA (current)

raw_text: I put a .1uF cap across the LED.
expected_behavior: no extraction — '.1uF' starts with dot not digit (regex requires leading digit)

raw_text: The instrument has a 100MHz, 500Ms/s spec.
expected_behavior: extract 100 MHz; '500Ms/s' not extracted (unit not in dictionary)

raw_text: Resistance drops from 200 ohms to 150 ohms.
expected_behavior: extract 200 Ω and 150 Ω

raw_text: I found an old 1615A Hewlett Packard logic analyser.
expected_behavior: no extraction — '1615A' is a part/model number not a quantity

raw_text: Signal went up to +14 dB at line level.
expected_behavior: extract 14 dB (sign before number handled by context; numeric stored as 14.0)

raw_text: The capacitor is rated at 10uF and costs 100%.
expected_behavior: extract 10 µF; '100%' is not extracted (no electrical unit)

raw_text: Operating frequency: approx 5 Hz, 10 Hz, or 20 Hz.
expected_behavior: extract three separate ELEC_QTY: 5 Hz, 10 Hz, 20 Hz

raw_text: Power supply delivers 12V at 500mA, total 6W.
expected_behavior: extract 12 V, 500 mA, 6 W (three quantities in one sentence)

raw_text: Jesus said in Luke 22.20: 'This cup is...'
expected_behavior: extract Luke 22:20 (period as chapter-verse separator)

raw_text: Paul writes in 1 Corinthians 11.26 about the Lord's Supper.
expected_behavior: extract 1 Corinthians 11:26

raw_text: See Matthew 25:31-46 for the judgment of nations.
expected_behavior: extract Matthew 25:31-46 (verse range)

raw_text: Ex 33:19 shows God's mercy.
expected_behavior: extract Exodus 33:19 (2-char abbreviation)

raw_text: Psalm 9:17: The wicked return to Sheol.
expected_behavior: extract Psalms 9:17 (singular 'Psalm' accepted)

raw_text: John Smith is the author of this paper.
expected_behavior: no extraction — 'John' here is a person's name, not a scripture reference

raw_text: 2 Thessalonians 1:6-10 states that those who trouble believers will be repaid.
expected_behavior: extract 2 Thessalonians 1:6-10

raw_text: Malachi predicted in Malachi 1.11 that offerings will be pure.
expected_behavior: extract Malachi 1:11 once (dedup same span)

raw_text: Acts of the Apostles is the fifth book of the New Testament.
expected_behavior: no extraction — 'Acts' here has no chapter:verse

raw_text: Revelation 21:6-8 and Revelation 14:9-12 both discuss judgment.
expected_behavior: extract two separate refs: Revelation 21:6-8 and Revelation 14:9-12
